message:
cli: extension event dispatch in print mode

Add extension lifecycle event dispatch to print mode (pi -p):

Extension imports:
- ExtensionEventName, extension_event_from_agent from extensions module
- serde_json::json for payload construction

Event handler refactoring:
- make_event_handler: closure factory that captures extensions and runtime
- Dispatches agent events to extensions via extension_event_from_agent
- JSON event output still emitted when mode == "json"

Input event dispatch:
- Fires Input event with { text: message } payload before each prompt
- Fires BeforeAgentStart event after Input
- Both initial message and subsequent messages get event dispatch

Signature change:
- run_print_mode now takes runtime_handle parameter for spawning

This ensures print mode has feature parity with interactive mode for
extension lifecycle events, enabling extensions to intercept input
and respond to agent events in non-interactive use cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
